# Fysh Oil

## Description

- Gain 1 Strength and 1 Dexterity.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Small but flexible combat potion; use before multi-attack or high-block turns to gain value from both Strength and Dexterity.
